ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Vikran Engineering Limited has secured a significant INR 3517.98 Crore work order for a 969 MW solar plant development from its newly acquired wholly-owned subsidiary, NOPL Solar Projects Private Limited. This contract replaces and substantially expands a previously cancelled INR 2035.26 Crore order (originally 600 MW) from Onix Renewable Limited, significantly boosting the company's confirmed project pipeline and streamlining execution by bringing the developer in-house. While stated to have no material adverse impact, the related-party nature of the transaction and the considerable increase in project scope warrant monitoring for transparent execution and effective value delivery.
